playbook.intent: Collect last week's thumbs-down / support tickets / NPS comments that touch the AI feature; cluster, route to engineering or product, feed worst into eval set.
playbook.scope: Collect last week's thumbs-down / support tickets / NPS comments that touch the AI feature; cluster, route to engineering or product, feed worst into eval set.

success-criteria.criterion: One-line verdict posted to team channel/dashboard for this cycle
Act-now items either executed and verified, or explicitly handed off
Cadence ledger updated so the next run starts in under 5 minutes
No silent-drop: every anomaly resolved or queued with an owner

stage.name: Pre-flight
stage.intent: Confirm inputs, dashboards, access, and yesterday's open items.

tasks.task: Verify required dashboards/logs are reachable and current
Set a hard time-box for this run

stage.decision-gate: Advance once every required surface is green; otherwise resolve the access/data gap first.

stage.name: Scan
stage.intent: Read the surface in one pass; capture anomalies without acting.

tasks.task: Walk through every required panel/chart/feed once
Log anomalies and outliers in a single scratchpad
Do not act on anything yet

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the scan is complete; if scan reveals an incident, branch to incident response.

stage.name: Triage
stage.intent: Score and bucket anomalies into act-now / investigate / ignore.

tasks.task: Score each anomaly by severity and reversibility
Pick at most 1-3 act-now items for this cycle

stage.decision-gate: Advance with no more than 1-3 act-now items; if more, raise the bar.

stage.name: Act
stage.intent: Execute the chosen act-now items end-to-end.

tasks.task: Execute each act-now item with an explicit owner and rollback plan
Hand off anything that exceeds the time-box

stage.decision-gate: Advance once every act-now item is either done or explicitly handed off; never silent-drop.

stage.name: Close
stage.intent: Post the one-line verdict, queue follow-ups, and end the loop.

tasks.task: Post a one-line verdict to the team channel/dashboard
Queue follow-ups in the appropriate backlog
Update the cadence ledger so future runs see the trend

stage.decision-gate: Required output: a written verdict; no "see how it goes".

extra.value: {human: faion get-content customer-ai-feedback-triage-weekly --format md, agent: faion get-content customer-ai-feedback-triage-weekly --format context, json: faion get-content customer-ai-feedback-triage-weekly --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 playbook from F-059-063 chunk-09.}]
